text: Key growth drivers center on AI-powered AWS expansion and advertising revenue, according to Q2 earnings preview analysis. Market commentary suggests Amazon is positioned to benefit from rising demand for chips and AI tools as the broader technology sector increases AI spending. The company's inclusion among the 'Magnificent Seven' technology stocks underscores its competitive positioning, with combined market value of these four tech behemoths reporting earnings representing approximately $11.3 trillion in market capitalization.
